hero.headline: Veteran-Built Solutions for Greener Living
hero.subheadline: For 19 years, Green Energy Products has helped South Florida homes and businesses slash energy costs, eliminate harsh chemicals, and reduce their environmental footprint. From solar panels to chemical-free pool purification, we deliver sustainable solutions backed by military-grade precision.
checkmarks: Trusted by Wyndham Hotels, FIU, and Miami-Dade County

services.label: Our Solutions
services.headline: Sustainable Products That<br class="hidden md:block">Pay for Themselves
services.subtitle: From chemical-free pool purification to solar energy systems, every solution we provide is designed to save you money while protecting the environment.

cards.title: Pool Purification Systems
cards.description: Enjoy a healthier pool without harsh chemicals. Our MineralPURE copper ionization and OzoneMAX ozone systems keep your water crystal clear while protecting your family's skin and eyes.

cards.title: Solar Energy Systems
cards.description: Slash your electricity bill with NABCEP-certified solar panel installation. We design photovoltaic and solar hot water systems tailored to South Florida's abundant sunshine.

cards.title: Energy Efficiency Audits
cards.description: Our certified team documents power quality issues, code violations, and energy waste across your property, then delivers a clear action plan to cut costs and consumption.

cards.title: Water Treatment Solutions
cards.description: Eliminate hard water damage without salt or chemicals. Our ScaleBlaster electronic descaling systems protect your plumbing, appliances, and fixtures from costly scale buildup.

cards.title: LED Lighting Upgrades
cards.description: Replace outdated lighting with energy-efficient LED systems that cut electricity costs by up to 75% while providing better illumination for homes and businesses.

cards.title: Building Automation
cards.description: Smart building systems that optimize your energy usage automatically. Reduce operational costs and improve comfort with intelligent climate and lighting controls.

steps.title: Book Your Free Audit
steps.description: Contact us for a complimentary on-site energy and environmental assessment. Our certified team evaluates your property's energy usage, water quality, and air quality to identify every opportunity for savings.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Plan
steps.description: We deliver a detailed report with prioritized recommendations — from quick wins like LED upgrades to long-term investments like solar. Every recommendation includes projected savings and ROI timelines.

steps.title: Save Money and the Planet
steps.description: Our team handles professional installation of every product and system. You start saving immediately on energy and chemical costs while reducing your environmental footprint for years to come.

about.label: Why South Florida Trusts Us
about.headline: Veteran-Owned, Mission-Driven — 19 Years of Greener Results
about.description: Founded in 2007 by a service-disabled veteran, Green Energy Products brings military discipline and environmental passion to every project. We have helped government agencies, universities, hotels, and homeowners across South Florida reduce energy consumption, eliminate harmful chemicals, and lower operating costs. Our clients include Wyndham Hotels, Florida International University, Miami-Dade County, and Barry University — organizations that demand proven results and accountability.

features.title: Chemical-Free Technology
features.description: Our pool purification and water treatment systems use copper ionization, ozone, and electronic descaling — zero harsh chemicals touching your family or the environment.

features.title: Government-Trusted Expertise
features.description: Certified by the SBA, VA, and Miami-Dade County. Our auditing team has served major institutions and agencies with proven energy and environmental solutions.

features.title: One-Stop Green Solutions
features.description: Solar, water, air quality, lighting, and building automation — we cover every aspect of sustainable living so you deal with one trusted partner instead of five vendors.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Real Savings.
pricing.subtitle: Every project starts with a free audit and detailed proposal. We show you the upfront cost, the projected savings, and the payback timeline — so you can make a confident decision with zero surprises.

guarantee.headline: Our Veteran's Promise
guarantee.description: We stand behind every product we install and every recommendation we make. If a system does not perform as promised, we come back and make it right — no excuses, no extra charges. After 19 years serving South Florida, our reputation is built on doing what we say we will do. That is the standard we learned in service, and it is the standard we bring to your home or business.

faqs.question: How does chemical-free pool purification work?
faqs.answer: Our MineralPURE system uses copper ionization to sanitize your pool water naturally, while OzoneMAX uses ozone gas to destroy bacteria and viruses on contact. Both systems dramatically reduce or eliminate the need for chlorine, resulting in softer water that is gentler on skin, eyes, and swimwear.

faqs.question: How much can I save with solar panels in South Florida?
faqs.answer: Most South Florida homeowners see a 30-50% reduction in electricity costs after solar installation. With our region's abundant sunshine and available tax credits, most systems pay for themselves within 5-8 years while adding value to your property.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of South Florida including Miami-Dade County, Pinecrest, Coral Gables, and surrounding communities. We work with residential, commercial, hospitality, government, and maritime clients throughout the region.

faqs.question: What is included in your free energy audit?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive audit covers electrical power quality, energy consumption patterns, code compliance, safety issues, water quality, and indoor air quality. You receive a detailed report with prioritized recommendations, projected savings, and ROI timelines for each improvement.

faqs.question: Do you work with commercial and government clients?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. As an SDVOSB-certified business, we are qualified for government contracts and have served major institutions including Wyndham Hotels, Florida International University, Miami-Dade County, and Barry University. We handle projects of all sizes.

testimonials.name: Margaret S.
testimonials.text: Being environmentally responsible is something important. Working with Green Energy Products has been a pleasure — great attention to detail and genuine care for sustainable results.

testimonials.name: David R.
testimonials.text: We switched to their chemical-free pool system two years ago and have not looked back. The water feels incredible, my kids' skin is no longer irritated, and we are saving money on chlorine every month.

testimonials.name: Patricia L.
testimonials.text: The energy audit alone was worth its weight in gold. They found issues we had no idea about and the LED upgrades they recommended cut our electric bill by over 40 percent in the first month.
testimonials.context: Commercial energy audit and LED retrofit
